InviteFriend.ReferralDescription: When a friend holds 10,000 DISCO tokens for 24 hours, you'll both earn 100 Fan Points!

Home.RiseFlow Description: Everyone who holds DISCO tokens in their wallet can receive free SUI cryptocurrency daily through a lottery-based airdrop service!
Home.Airdrop Sent: Airdrop will be sent to your wallet
Home.Hold DISCO Get Ticket: Simply hold DISCO tokens → Get 1 ticket every day

PrizeHistory.Description: You can freely transfer the tokens you have won to your wallet from this page.

FanPoints.Description: Fan points are experience points that can be earned based on lottery results and usage frequency.
FanPoints.SuccessToast: Fan points can be received once every 12 hours (UTC 0:00-12:00, 12:00-24:00).
FanPoints.Points Description: Earned fan points are used as important factors for airdrop distribution and incentive rewards, and their holdings provide investment benefits. We sincerely thank you for your support from all users.

MembershipNFT.Description: Our project team is committed to expanding the possibilities of blockchain and building a sustainable ecosystem together with you. As part of this vision, we have created the DISCO Genesis NFT, an asset of unique value.
MembershipNFT.NFT Description: This NFT is more than just a collectible—it serves as a digital membership for our early investors, providing an enriched service experience.
MembershipNFT.NFT Uniqueness: Each DISCO Genesis NFT is an entirely original work of art. Every NFT is uniquely designed and minted, ensuring that no two are the same in the world.
MembershipNFT.Chicken Description: Chicken Edition is a unique NFT featuring Disna, a girl dressed in a chicken cosplay, filled with playfulness and individuality. Her innocent expression and lively design highlight her cuteness and charm, giving her a distinctive presence.
MembershipNFT.Limited Edition: This limited edition NFT is a special item that adds a new dimension to your collection and provides a fun accent.
MembershipNFT.Invitation: We warmly invite you to welcome this adorable Disna into your world.
MembershipNFT.Airdrop Description: By receiving regularly distributed free airdrop lottery tickets, your chances of earning rewards increase. This is a special opportunity exclusively for NFT holders, bringing even more excitement.
MembershipNFT.Fan Points Description: Each time you earn fan points, an additional bonus is automatically granted. Owning an NFT enhances your next airdrop and incentive rewards, allowing you to enjoy the added benefits as they accumulate.
MembershipNFT.Governance Description: Participate in important decisions regarding the project's future and make your voice heard as a member of the community. We value the voices of our community and aim to build a better future together through blockchain technology.
MembershipNFT.Priority Description: Enjoy early access to new services and features. NFT holders receive special privileges, allowing them to explore new offerings before public release.
MembershipNFT.Revenue Utilization: Utilization of Revenue and Ecosystem Growth
MembershipNFT.Revenue Description: All revenue generated from NFT sales is allocated to enhancing the liquidity of DISCO tokens and expanding the reward pool. This strengthens the ecosystem's stability and supports long-term, sustainable growth.
MembershipNFT.Supply Description: The DISCO Genesis NFT collection will be released in limited quantities, and once sold out, no further NFTs will be issued.
MembershipNFT.Closing Statement: With this project, we embark on a journey of innovation and growth together with our early supporters. By leveraging blockchain technology, we strive to create meaningful value and build a vibrant, sustainable ecosystem. Thank you sincerely for your continued support.

ExploreDISCORAVE.AI agent operating: AI Agent Operating in the Backend
ExploreDISCORAVE.RiseFlowAI Description: RiseFlowAI is an innovative AI agent that utilizes cutting-edge algorithms and data analysis technologies to efficiently identify tokens with high growth potential and optimally redistribute their liquidity for the benefit of investors.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Market Analysis Description: By analyzing vast amounts of real-time data such as transaction history, liquidity, and market capitalization, RiseFlowAI accurately predicts market trends and swiftly identifies tokens with strong growth potential.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Airdrop Description: A fair and transparent system is employed to airdrop tokens to users based on specific conditions and criteria. Using a lottery-based distribution method, token amounts and winning probabilities are carefully managed to ensure the overall sustainability of the ecosystem.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Returns Description: Liquidity is efficiently adjusted to maximize investor returns, while maintaining the health and stability of the ecosystem.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Future Vision: RiseFlowAI is more than just a token analysis tool—it serves as a powerful AI partner that supports the foundation of future decentralized finance (DeFi). Through this innovative technology, it aims to create a world where everyone has access to fair and attractive investment opportunities.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Guide Description: The lottery airdrop is a completely free service powered by innovative AI technology, requiring no staking. Anyone can participate easily and with peace of mind.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Token Holding: Simply holding DISCO tokens in your wallet allows you to receive daily prize tokens through airdrops. As the value of DISCO tokens increases, the quantity of prize tokens you receive also increases automatically. All processes are managed fairly by AI agents, providing a reliable service.
ExploreDISCORAVE.No Staking Description: You can participate in the lottery airdrop just by holding DISCO tokens—no special operations or token locking are required. You can sell your tokens anytime, providing flexible trading options. This simple and stress-free system allows users to enjoy full freedom while participating.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Free Description: Participating in the lottery does not consume your DISCO tokens. Airdrop participation is entirely free, with no additional costs, making it accessible and hassle-free for everyone.
ExploreDISCORAVE.No Losers Description: Every participant is guaranteed to receive a prize token. Regardless of the lottery outcome, everyone will win something, ensuring a fair and enjoyable experience for all.
ExploreDISCORAVE.AI Management Description: From lottery execution to prize token distribution, all processes are fairly and precisely managed by the latest AI agents. The AI also records DISCO token holdings and lottery results, providing a trustworthy and seamless airdrop experience.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Purchase Description: • DISCO tokens can be purchased at the designated exchange.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Purchase Description2: • Please hold the specified amount of tokens in your wallet.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Connect Description: • Hold the purchased tokens in your wallet and connect to the platform.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Connect Description2: • The AI agent will automatically recognize the number of tokens held.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Hold Description: • To participate in the lottery, you must hold the DISCO tokens in your wallet for at least 24 hours.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Hold Description2: • This condition is verified by the AI agent using snapshots.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Weekly Bonus Description: • If you hold DISCO tokens for more than a week, you will receive additional airdrop tickets every Monday at 00:00 UTC.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Snapshot Description: • The AI agent takes snapshots of the token holding status four times a day (UTC 00:00, 06:00, 12:00, 18:00).
ExploreDISCORAVE.Distribution Description: • If the conditions are met, lottery tickets will be distributed the next day at UTC 00:00.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Validity Description: • The validity of the tickets is 14 days. Be sure to use them before they expire.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Management Description: • Tickets are automatically managed by the AI agent and processed in order from the oldest.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Participate: Participate in the Airdrop Lottery and Receive Prizes
ExploreDISCORAVE.Button Description: • Simply click the 'Lottery Button' on the platform's main page to participate.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Lottery Description: • The AI agent dynamically adjusts the prize tokens (type, quantity, winning probability) every 5 minutes based on market data analysis.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Results Description: The results of the lottery are displayed in real-time. You can also check the past results on the history page anytime after the lottery date.
ExploreDISCORAVE.History Description: • Access the 'Winning History' page to check the types and quantities of your prize tokens.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Transfer Tokens: Transfer Prize Tokens to Your Wallet
ExploreDISCORAVE.Transfer Description: Prize tokens can be transferred to your wallet from the 'Winning History' page.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Daily Tips: Tips for Enjoying the Service Daily
ExploreDISCORAVE.Daily Description: By meeting the conditions, new lottery tickets will be distributed the next day. By participating daily, you increase your chances of receiving rewards.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Holdings Description: The more DISCO tokens you hold, the more lottery tickets you can earn—and with them, more opportunities to win.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Confidence Description: Fan Points are awarded based on lottery results. These points can be used for future incentives and special in-service benefits, enhancing the overall enjoyment of participation.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Closing: The DISCO Token Lottery Airdrop is a completely free and staking-free innovative service that anyone can easily join.
ExploreDISCORAVE.Final Message: Thanks to the advanced management of AI agents, you can use the service with complete confidence. As the value of DISCO tokens increases, so too does the number of prize tokens distributed. Hold your tokens and join the daily lottery airdrop to earn exciting new prize tokens!

Tokenomics.Introduction: We sincerely appreciate your interest in our project. In this document, we emphasize transparency in tokenomics and provide detailed explanations about the purpose and role of each allocation.
Tokenomics.Total Issuance: Our project has set a total issuance of 30 billion tokens,
Tokenomics.Total Issuance3: and it is allocated as follows. This allocation has been carefully designed to maintain a balanced growth of the ecosystem, operational sustainability, and market stability.
Tokenomics.Airdrops Description: These tokens are allocated to increase token awareness and attract a wide range of participants to the ecosystem. They will be strategically distributed to promote awareness and community development. Distribution conditions and target participants will be determined based on the progress and goals of the project.
Tokenomics.Incentives Description: These incentives promote user participation and engagement, driving ecosystem growth. Additionally, they will support the development of new ideas and use cases, contributing to the overall value of the ecosystem.
Tokenomics.Liquidity Description: These tokens are reserved to ensure liquidity on decentralized exchanges (DEXs). They will serve as incentives for liquidity providers and play a crucial role in maintaining a stable and efficient trading environment, thereby supporting market health.
Tokenomics.Foundation Description: This allocation supports essential project operations such as team management, technical development, marketing, and legal compliance. It is key to ensuring the project’s stability, competitiveness, and long-term sustainability.
Tokenomics.Stability Description: These tokens are allocated to maintain price stability and reduce market volatility. They will support both centralized exchanges (CEXs) and decentralized exchanges (DEXs), providing a predictable and secure trading environment for all participants.
Tokenomics.Reserves Description: The reserve funds are set aside to respond to unexpected circumstances and support the long-term sustainability of the project. This allocation will also contribute to the creation of innovative opportunities, business expansion, and the achievement of strategic growth objectives.
Tokenomics.Burns Description: Regular token burns will adjust the supply and increase scarcity, ensuring price stability. This process will be conducted transparently to maintain the economic health of the ecosystem and foster trust.
Tokenomics.Partnerships Description: These tokens will support collaborations with other projects and businesses, promoting cross-chain integration, the development of new use cases, and market expansion. Strategic partnerships play a vital role in accelerating growth and enhancing the value of the ecosystem.
Tokenomics.Growth Description: We aim to activate and continuously expand the ecosystem through community incentives and the establishment of strategic partnerships. This ensures healthy growth, allowing all participants to share in the value.
Tokenomics.Liquidity Support Description: Liquidity is ensured to maintain smooth trading environments and prevent major price fluctuations, offering users a safe and stable trading experience.
Tokenomics.Operational Description: Funding will be secured to stabilize the project's operations and establish a foundation for sustainable growth, preparing for unexpected changes and risks to ensure long-term success.
Tokenomics.Closing Description: This token allocation has been carefully designed with a balance between growth and stability in mind, ensuring both short-term and long-term success. We prioritize reliable fund management as a cornerstone for building trust and promoting sustainable development.
Tokenomics.Sincerely: We extend our heartfelt gratitude for your warm and continued support.

VGCTokensModel.Introduction: In our ecosystem, we have adopted the 'Value Growth Contribution (VGC) Model.' This model ensures that each token purchase directly contributes to the growth of the entire ecosystem. In this innovative model, a portion of each purchase is utilized and rewarded to token holders, while also enhancing market stability.
VGCTokensModel.Model Description: The VGC Model is designed to encourage the participation of each investor, promoting the overall development of the ecosystem and supporting sustainable growth.
VGCTokensModel.Circulation Description: 10% to 20% of the token purchase amount is allocated to support the growth of the ecosystem. This funding is divided into two uses:
VGCTokensModel.Reward Description: This portion is used as rewards for all token holders. This allows token holders to directly benefit from the growth of the ecosystem.
VGCTokensModel.Liquidity Description: This portion is used to enhance liquidity and stabilize market prices, ensuring that new participants can enter the market with confidence.
VGCTokensModel.Growth Description: A portion of the purchase amount circulates within the ecosystem, which results in a long-term increase in the value of the tokens. This growth benefits all investors.
VGCTokensModel.Investor Benefits: Investor Benefits in the VGC Model
VGCTokensModel.Returns Description: By simply holding the tokens, you can receive rewards from the reward pool. Your purchase contributes to the overall growth of the ecosystem, and the results are distributed as returns to all token holders.
VGCTokensModel.Stability Description: By strengthening the liquidity pool, the impact of large transactions on the market is minimized, resulting in stable price formation.
VGCTokensModel.Appreciation Description: As the ecosystem grows and liquidity increases, rewards for holders become more substantial. This could increase demand for tokens and potentially raise their price. For investors, the VGC model aims to enhance asset value.
VGCTokensModel.Transparency Description: The use of purchase amounts is fully transparent, and it is clear how your investment contributes to the overall growth of the ecosystem.
VGCTokensModel.Model Differences: How the VGC Model Differs from Others
VGCTokensModel.Differences Description: The VGC model is designed so that each individual purchase by an investor directly contributes to the growth of the ecosystem. While traditional models may prioritize operator profits, the VGC model emphasizes value return to the community and high transparency.
VGCTokensModel.Future: The Future of the VGC Model
VGCTokensModel.Future Description: The VGC Model is designed as a 'Value Sharing Model,' where each token purchase contributes to the ecosystem’s growth. This mechanism ensures sustainable development of the ecosystem and guarantees that all investors benefit from its expansion.
VGCTokensModel.Benefits List:
The joy of receiving rewards from the reward pool
Peace of mind from stable market prices
Potential price appreciation due to increased token demand
A sense of fulfillment in shaping the future through your investment
VGCTokensModel.Join Us: Through the Value Growth Contribution (VGC) Model, let’s create and share value together. Your participation breathes life into this ecosystem and becomes a driving force for the future. We deeply value walking alongside every user, as your involvement powers the growth of the entire token ecosystem. Join us in building a new cycle of value.

FAQ.How to hold: How can I hold DISCO tokens to participate in the lottery?
FAQ.Hold Answer: Simply holding the required number of DISCO tokens in your connected wallet will automatically grant you lottery tickets. No special procedures or actions are required, making it easy to participate.
FAQ.Fan Points Answer: Fan Points are user points earned based on the number of lottery participations and results. Accumulated points can be used for future airdrop distributions and decision-making regarding service directions. They function as experience points within the service, not blockchain-based tokens, and cannot be traded or transferred.
FAQ.How to earn: How can I earn Fan Points?
FAQ.Earn Answer: You can earn Fan Points by participating in the lottery, winning prizes, or visiting the service. You can check your earned points in the 'My Page' section.
FAQ.Points determination: How are the number of Fan Points determined?
FAQ.Points Answer: In addition to the basic points earned from participating in the lottery, bonus points are awarded based on the value of the prizes won and the NFTs held. The more valuable the tokens you win, the more points you earn.
FAQ.Points usage: How can I use Fan Points?
FAQ.Usage Answer: Fan Points can be used to receive future airdrops or special benefits based on the amount held. Please refer to official announcements for more details.
FAQ.Points expiration: Do Fan Points have an expiration date?
FAQ.Expiration Answer: Although Fan Points may be reset based on the timing of airdrop distributions or special benefits, they do not have a set expiration date. Please refer to official announcements for the latest information.
FAQ.Token spending: Do I need to spend DISCO tokens to participate in the lottery?
FAQ.Spending Answer: No, DISCO tokens are not consumed when participating in the lottery. You can participate for free by simply keeping the tokens in your wallet.
FAQ.Prize types: What types of prizes can I win in the lottery?
FAQ.Prize Answer: Various types of cryptocurrency tokens are offered as prizes. It is possible to win tokens worth up to $100, making the rewards very attractive.
FAQ.Losing entries: Is it possible to not win anything in the lottery?
FAQ.Losing Answer: No, you will always win some tokens. All participants are guaranteed to receive some tokens, so you can participate with peace of mind.
FAQ.Multiple tickets: How can I receive more lottery tickets?
FAQ.Tickets Answer: Based on the amount of DISCO tokens you hold, you will receive multiple lottery tickets daily. The more tokens you hold, the more tickets you will receive.
FAQ.Check results: How can I check the lottery results?
FAQ.Results Answer: The lottery results are displayed in real time. You can also check past results from the history page at any time, even after the lottery date.
FAQ.Ticket validity: Do lottery tickets have an expiration date?
FAQ.Validity Answer: Yes, lottery tickets are valid for 14 days from the date of distribution. Be sure to use them before the expiration date.
FAQ.Unused tickets: What happens if I don't use my lottery ticket?
FAQ.Unused Answer: Lottery tickets that are not used within 14 days will become invalid. However, new tickets are distributed daily, so you can continue to participate in future lotteries.
FAQ.Prize location: Where will the prize tokens be sent if I win in the lottery?
FAQ.Location Answer: The prize tokens you win can be sent to your wallet from the lottery result history page. Please ensure that the transfer is completed within 24 hours after the results are displayed.
FAQ.Purchase tokens: How can I purchase DISCO tokens?
FAQ.Purchase Answer: DISCO tokens can be purchased on major cryptocurrency exchanges. Search for 'DISCO' on the exchange and follow the instructions to complete the purchase process.
FAQ.Service fees: Are there any fees to use the service?
FAQ.Fees Answer: No, there are no fees to use this service. You can participate in the lottery for free by simply holding DISCO tokens.
FAQ.Token deposit: Do I need to deposit DISCO tokens to participate in the lottery?
FAQ.Deposit Answer: No, you do not need to deposit DISCO tokens. Simply holding them in your connected wallet will automatically grant you lottery tickets.
FAQ.Token verification: How is the number of DISCO tokens I hold verified?
FAQ.Verification Answer: The number of DISCO tokens you hold is recorded in a snapshot every 6 hours at 0:00, 6:00, 12:00, and 18:00 UTC. The number of lottery tickets you receive is determined based on these snapshots.
FAQ.Ticket distribution: When are the lottery tickets distributed?
FAQ.Distribution Answer: Lottery tickets are distributed at 0:00 UTC the day after the snapshot of your DISCO token holdings.
FAQ.Holding conditions: What are the conditions for holding DISCO tokens?
FAQ.Conditions Answer: To be eligible for the snapshot, you must hold DISCO tokens in your connected wallet for more than 24 hours.
FAQ.Unconnected wallets: Are wallets not connected to the service included in the snapshot?
FAQ.Unconnected Answer: No, wallets that are not connected to the service are not included in the snapshot. Please ensure your wallet is connected to participate.
FAQ.Connection cost: Is there a cost to connect my wallet to the service?
FAQ.Connection Answer: No, connecting your wallet to the service is completely free. You can use it with peace of mind.
FAQ.Token selling: Can I sell DISCO tokens at any time?
FAQ.Selling Answer: Yes, you can sell DISCO tokens at any time. However, if your holdings fall below the required minimum amount, you will no longer receive lottery tickets.
FAQ.Process Answer: The lottery is conducted automatically and accurately based on the publicly disclosed probability. All participants are provided with a fair chance.
FAQ.Token loss: Is there a possibility of losing DISCO tokens by participating in the lottery?
FAQ.Loss Answer: No, you will not lose your DISCO tokens. Your token holdings will remain intact, and no tokens are consumed during the lottery process.
FAQ.Token display: What should I do if the prize tokens do not appear in my wallet?
FAQ.Display Answer: If the prize tokens are not displayed in your wallet, you may need to manually import them using the contract address (CA). Please check your wallet to ensure they are correctly added.
FAQ.Network: On which network does DISCO tokens operate?
FAQ.Network Answer: DISCO tokens operate on the SUI network. The prizes in the lottery are also SUI tokens.
FAQ.Prize amount: How is the amount of prize tokens determined?
FAQ.Amount Answer: The amount of prize tokens is based on the transaction price, which is updated every 5 minutes. The latest price at the time of the lottery determines the amount of tokens to be distributed.
FAQ.Gas fees: Are gas fees required when transferring prize tokens to my wallet?
FAQ.Gas Answer: No, DISCO RAVE will cover the gas fees for sending prize tokens to your wallet, so you will not need to pay any fees.

TermsOfUse.Title: Terms of Use
TermsOfUse.Introduction: These Terms of Use (hereinafter referred to as the 'Terms') set forth the conditions applicable to all users (hereinafter referred to as 'Users') of DISCO.FAN (hereinafter referred to as the 'Service'). Please read these Terms carefully and agree to them before using the Service.
TermsOfUse.Article1_1: These Terms apply to all activities related to the use of the Service.
TermsOfUse.Article1_2: By using the Service, Users are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.
TermsOfUse.Article2_1: The Service provides various features related to cryptocurrency, including token distribution using blockchain technology, lottery events, information services, and wallet connections.
TermsOfUse.Article2_2: Please note that the Service does not provide financial services such as transfers using legal tender, foreign exchange transactions, or investment advice.
TermsOfUse.Article3_1: To use certain features of the Service, Users must connect a compatible cryptocurrency wallet.
TermsOfUse.Article3_2: To be eligible for snapshots or lotteries, Users must hold specified tokens (e.g., DISCO tokens) in their wallet for a certain period. Please refer to in-service guidance for details.
TermsOfUse.Article3_3: Wallet connections are free, and wallet information is managed appropriately in accordance with our privacy policy.
TermsOfUse.Article4_1: Lotteries are conducted automatically based on publicly disclosed rules and probabilities, and entry rights are granted according to the user's DISCO token holdings.
TermsOfUse.Article4_2: Tokens won through the lottery will be sent to the respective user’s wallet. The Service covers the gas fees for such transfers.
TermsOfUse.Article4_3: If the tokens do not appear in the wallet, users may need to manually import the contract address.
TermsOfUse.Article5_1: Users must not engage in the following activities:
TermsOfUse.Article5_2: - Acts that violate laws or public order and morals
TermsOfUse.Article5_4: - Unauthorized use of others’ wallets or personal information
TermsOfUse.Article5_5: - Interference with the operation of the Service
TermsOfUse.Article6_1: Due to the nature of blockchain technology, some features may be temporarily unavailable due to technical limitations or network issues.
TermsOfUse.Article6_2: Users are solely responsible for managing their wallets and private keys. The Service is not responsible for any loss of assets.
TermsOfUse.Article6_3: The Service assumes no responsibility for token price fluctuations.
TermsOfUse.Article7_1: The logos, designs, content, programs, and other intellectual property published in the Service belong to the Service or the rightful owners.
TermsOfUse.Article7_2: Unauthorized use or reproduction is strictly prohibited.
TermsOfUse.Article8_1: The Service may amend these Terms as necessary. In case of significant changes, Users will be notified in advance through the Service.
TermsOfUse.Article9_1: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of Singapore.
TermsOfUse.Article9_2: In the event of a dispute related to the Service, the Singapore courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction as the court of first instance.
